prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Furan frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV).
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density fitting) in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on user-supplied Cartesian geometry (file: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz); no further optimisation (notation: DFT//input-xyz).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge = 0; multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet, RHF/RKS reference).
Software: PySCF backend via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (pyscf engine; version not reported in JSON). SCF converged in 9 cycles.
Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine.
Integrity checks: status ok, trustworthy = True (all standard checks passed).

Headline numerical results (eV)
• HOMO energy: –6.3597638 eV
• LUMO energy: –0.1024036 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap: 6.2573602 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap; not an excitation energy)

Live run artifacts
The run streamed a live log to the default frontier-orbitals_<timestamp>.out file in the current working directory (path echoed at job launch); JSON results saved to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpuz5ft_f4/live.json.

Result provenance: computed (DFT single-point)
